confidenceReason: The telemetry rollup covers the full window with no gaps; the band boundaries are unambiguous.
evidenceSummary: The four-week telemetry window puts mutation p99 at 262 ms, inside the 300 ms target band.

basis.statement: The rollup query was run against the recorded window with no missing weeks.

findings.condition: The rollup query across all mutation endpoints reports p99 between 248 ms and 276 ms week over week, aggregating to 262 ms.

criteria.criterion: p99 at or under 300 ms over the window.
criteria.rationale: The band was recalibrated to 300 ms after the caching work landed; the measurement tests the new floor.

effect.statement: Latency sits comfortably inside the recalibrated target band, supporting the target performance rating.

evidence.statement: Weekly p99 values of 248, 259, 276, and 264 ms across the window; no week exceeded the target band.

findings.statement: Mutation p99 measured 262 ms over the representative four-week window.

summary: The four-week telemetry window puts mutation p99 at 262 ms, inside the 300 ms target band.
